payload.answer: The prior proposal could not be safely applied because it was invalid or unsafe. Please choose a repair option or provide clarification before any memory changes are made.
repair_options: Escalate the request to a stronger validation path before generating candidate memory changes.
Reject the unsafe proposal and make no memory changes.
Ask the user to restate the intended memory update with enough detail to validate it safely.
If the intended update is an additive fact, offer to add it separately without merging it into existing memories until conflicts are resolved.
If the intended update may conflict with existing memory, ask the user whether it supersedes, corrects, contradicts, duplicates, or should coexist with existing information.

raw_text: {"answer":"The prior proposal could not be safely applied because it was invalid or unsafe.
